if.if: AND ( CLUB_NTC_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR CLUB_NTC_CN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM CLUB_MEMBER WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND CLUB_NO = #{clubNo} AND CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT IS NULL ORDER BY CLUB_MBR_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CLUB_MEMBER (CLUB_MBR_NO, EMP_ID, CLUB_NO, CLUB_MBR_JOIN_DT, CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT, CLUB_MBR_AUTH, CLUB_JOIN_GRET) VALUES(SEQ_CLUB_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{empId}, #{clubNo}, SYSDATE, '', '회원', #{clubJoinGret})
mapper.select: SELECT CM.CLUB_MBR_NO, CM.EMP_ID, CM.CLUB_MBR_JOIN_DT, CM.CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT, CM.CLUB_MBR_AUTH, CM.CLUB_JOIN_GRET, FN_GET_AVATAR_NM(E.EMP_ID) AS AVT_SAVE_NM, E.EMP_NM, D.DEPT_NM, E.EMP_JBGD FROM CLUB_MEMBER CM INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON CM.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE CM.CLUB_NO = #{clubNo} AND CM.CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT IS NULL ORDER BY CM.CLUB_MBR_AUTH DESC, CM.CLUB_MBR_JOIN_DT ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CLUB_MEMBER WHERE CLUB_NO = #{clubNo} AND CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_NOTICE WHERE CLUB_NO = #{clubNo} AND CLUB_NTC_STTS = 'N'

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY N.CLUB_NTC_DT DESC) RNUM , N.CLUB_NTC_NO , N.CLUB_NO , N.EMP_ID , N.DEPT_CD , N.CLUB_NTC_TTL , N.CLUB_NTC_CN , N.CLUB_NTC_CNT , N.CLUB_NTC_DT , N.CLUB_NTC_STTS , E.EMP_NM , E.EMP_JBGD FROM CLUB_NOTICE N INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON E.EMP_ID = N.EMP_ID WHERE N.CLUB_NO = #{clubNo} AND N.CLUB_NTC_STTS = 'N'
AND N.CLUB_NTC_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND N.CLUB_NTC_CN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( N.CLUB_NTC_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR N.CLUB_NTC_CN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY RNUM ASC) T WHERE RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10) - (10 - 1) AND (#{currentPage} * 10)

SELECT N.CLUB_NTC_NO , N.CLUB_NTC_TTL , N.CLUB_NTC_CN , N.CLUB_NTC_CNT , N.CLUB_NTC_DT , FN_GET_AVATAR_NM(E.EMP_ID) AS AVT_SAVE_NM , E.EMP_NM , E.EMP_JBGD , D.DEPT_NM FROM CLUB_NOTICE N INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON E.EMP_ID = N.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON D.DEPT_CD = E.DEPT_CD WHERE N.CLUB_NTC_NO = #{clubNtcNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CLUB_NOTICE (CLUB_NTC_NO, CLUB_NO, EMP_ID, DEPT_CD, CLUB_NTC_TTL, CLUB_NTC_CN, CLUB_NTC_CNT, CLUB_NTC_DT, CLUB_NTC_STTS) VALUES(SEQ_CLUB_NOTICE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{clubNo}, #{empId}, 0, #{clubNtcTtl}, #{clubNtcCn}, 0, SYSDATE, 'N')

INSERT INTO CLUB_BOARD ( CLUB_BBS_NO , CLUB_NO , CLUB_MBR_NO , DEPT_CD , CLUB_BBS_TTL , CLUB_BBS_CN , CLUB_BBS_CNT , CLUB_BBS_DT , CLUB_BBS_STTS , CLUB_BBS_FILE_NO , CLUB_BBS_DCL_YN) VALUES ( SEQ_CLUB_BOARD_NO.NEXTVAL , #{clubNo} , #{clubMbrNo} , #{deptCd} , #{clubBbsTtl} , #{clubBbsCn} , 0 , SYSDATE , 'N' , #{clubBbsFileNo} , 'N')
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_BOARD B INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON E.EMP_ID = B.CLUB_MBR_NO WHERE B.CLUB_NO = #{clubNo} AND B.CLUB_BBS_STTS = 'N'
AND ( B.CLUB_BBS_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.CLUB_BBS_CN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT B.CLUB_BBS_NO, B.CLUB_NO, B.CLUB_MBR_NO, B.CLUB_BBS_TTL, B.CLUB_BBS_CN, B.CLUB_BBS_CNT, B.CLUB_BBS_DT, E.EMP_NM, E.EMP_JBGD, B.DEPT_CD, FN_GET_DEPT_NM(B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_NM, FN_GET_AVATAR_NM(E.EMP_ID) AS AVT_SAVE_NM, FD.FILE_DTL_ID, FD.FILE_ID, FD.FILE_DTL_PATH, FD.FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM FROM CLUB_BOARD B INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON B.CLUB_MBR_NO = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN FILE_DETAIL FD ON B.CLUB_BBS_FILE_NO = FD.FILE_ID WHERE B.CLUB_BBS_NO = #{clubBbsNo}

SELECT C.CLUB_NO AS clubNo , C.CLUB_NM AS clubNm
, E.EMP_NM || '(' || E.EMP_ID || ')' AS presidentNm
, TO_CHAR(C.CLUB_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDt
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_MEMBER CM_SUB WHERE CM_SUB.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO) AS memberTotalCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_MEMBER CM_SUB WHERE CM_SUB.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO AND CM_SUB.CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT IS NULL) AS memberActiveCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_MEMBER CM_SUB WHERE CM_SUB.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO AND CM_SUB.CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT IS NOT NULL) AS memberWhdwlCnt
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_NOTICE N WHERE N.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO) AS noticeTotalCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_NOTICE N WHERE N.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO AND N.CLUB_NTC_STTS = 'N') AS noticeActiveCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_NOTICE N WHERE N.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO AND N.CLUB_NTC_STTS = 'Y') AS noticeDelCnt
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_BOARD B WHERE B.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO) AS galleryTotalCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_BOARD B WHERE B.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO AND B.CLUB_BBS_STTS = 'N') AS galleryActiveCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLUB_BOARD B WHERE B.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO AND B.CLUB_BBS_STTS = 'Y') AS galleryDelCnt
FROM CLUB C
LEFT OUTER JOIN CLUB_MEMBER CM ON C.CLUB_NO = CM.CLUB_NO AND CM.CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT IS NULL AND CM.CLUB_MBR_AUTH = '회장'
LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON CM.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID
ORDER BY C.CLUB_NO ASC

SELECT C.CLUB_NM AS "clubName", M.MONTH_STR AS "monthStr", COUNT(P.CLUB_NO) AS "postCount" FROM CLUB C CROSS JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -5 + LEVEL - 1), 'MM') || '월' AS MONTH_STR, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -5 + LEVEL - 1), 'YYYY-MM') AS MONTH_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 6 ) M LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CLUB_NO, TO_CHAR(CLUB_NTC_DT, 'YYYY-MM') AS POST_DT FROM CLUB_NOTICE WHERE CLUB_NTC_STTS = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT CLUB_NO, TO_CHAR(CLUB_BBS_DT, 'YYYY-MM') AS POST_DT FROM CLUB_BOARD WHERE CLUB_BBS_STTS = 'N' ) P ON C.CLUB_NO = P.CLUB_NO AND M.MONTH_KEY = P.POST_DT GROUP BY C.CLUB_NM, M.MONTH_KEY, M.MONTH_STR ORDER BY C.CLUB_NM, M.MONTH_KEY

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.CLUB_NO AS "clubNo", C.CLUB_NM AS "clubNm", B.CLUB_BBS_TTL AS "clubBbsTtl", D.FILE_DTL_PATH AS "thumbnailSaveNm" FROM CLUB_BOARD B INNER JOIN CLUB C ON B.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO INNER JOIN FILE_DETAIL D ON B.CLUB_BBS_FILE_NO = D.FILE_ID WHERE B.CLUB_BBS_FILE_NO IS NOT NULL AND B.CLUB_BBS_STTS = 'N' AND D.FILE_DTL_DEL_YN = 'N' AND (D.FILE_DTL_EXT IN ('jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif') OR D.FILE_DTL_EXT IN ('JPG', 'JPEG', 'PNG', 'GIF')) ORDER BY B.CLUB_BBS_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT A.CLUB_MBR_NO , B.EMP_NM , C.CLUB_NM , A.CLUB_MBR_AUTH , A.CLUB_MBR_JOIN_DT , A.CLUB_MBR_WHDWL_DT , A.EMP_ID , A.CLUB_NO , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_NM FROM CLUB_MEMBER A LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN CLUB C ON A.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO ORDER BY A.CLUB_MBR_JOIN_DT DESC

SELECT A.CLUB_NTC_NO , C.CLUB_NM , A.CLUB_NTC_TTL , B.EMP_NM , A.CLUB_NTC_DT , A.CLUB_NTC_STTS , A.CLUB_NTC_CNT , A.EMP_ID , A.CLUB_NO , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_NM FROM CLUB_NOTICE A LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN CLUB C ON A.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO ORDER BY A.CLUB_NTC_NO DESC

SELECT A.CLUB_BBS_NO , C.CLUB_NM , A.CLUB_BBS_TTL , B.EMP_NM , A.CLUB_BBS_DT , A.CLUB_BBS_STTS , A.CLUB_BBS_CNT , A.CLUB_MBR_NO , A.CLUB_NO , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_NM FROM CLUB_BOARD A LEFT JOIN CLUB_MEMBER M ON A.CLUB_MBR_NO = M.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.CLUB_MBR_NO = B.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN CLUB C ON A.CLUB_NO = C.CLUB_NO ORDER BY A.CLUB_BBS_NO DESC
